sentence_reviews.text: Adaptive optimizers such as AdaGrad, RMSProp, Adam, and Adafactor rescale parameter updates using running first- and second-moment statistics.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Chapter 8.3 momentum and Chapter 8.5 adaptive learning-rate algorithms.
sentence_reviews.notes: Adaptive methods are presented in the context of stochastic gradient optimization and momentum-like methods; the wording is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization, Statistics & experimental design.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
